payload.label: table
payload.long_description: Close-up of a beige, speckled stone or laminate table surface with granular brown and tan flecks and a slight glossy reflection; the surface is edge-cropped in the foreground and background and holds a small crumpled red-and-green object on a white paper, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
